name: Pineapple Crumble
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Can unsweetened pineapple, crushed and drained
2 medium Pears, peeled, cored and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Combine filling ingredients in a mixing bowl and pat into a 9-inch square baking pan.
3. Melt margarine in a skillet and remove from heat. Stir in the remaining topping ingredients until evenly coated with the margarine. Sprinkle evenly over the top of the pineapple mixture.
4. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes.
